  "findings": [
    "Instruments and control valves were not isolated or removed prior to initiating the hydrostatic pressure test."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the pressure test and depressurize the system.",
    "Isolate, blind, or remove all sensitive instrumentation, transmitters, and control valves.",
    "Inspect any instruments already subjected to test pressure for damage or calibration drift."
  ],
  "rationale": "ASME B31.3 §345 requires that instruments and other equipment not designed to withstand the test pressure must be isolated or disconnected before the test begins. Proceeding with the hydro-test without isolating these components risks catastrophic instrument failure, system leaks, and invalidation of the test.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3 §345.1",
    "ASME B31.3 §345.4.2"
  ]
}
